items.title: Seoul braces for the BTS Army as the world's biggest band returns
items.dek: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook will perform together for the first time since October 2022.

items.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
items.dek: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
